scenarios.description: clean(html, empty baseUri, safelist that preserves relative links) uses DummyUri placeholder
scenarios.expectedResult: returns cleaned fragment with preserved relative URLs via DummyUri resolution
pseudocode: TEST TC10 clean empty-baseUri with preserveRelativeLinks

scenarios.description: clean(html, empty baseUri, safelist that does not preserve relative links) removes relative URLs
scenarios.expectedResult: returns cleaned fragment with href attribute removed or empty
pseudocode: TEST TC11 clean empty-baseUri without preserveRelativeLinks

scenarios.description: clean(html, non-empty baseUri, safelist that preserves relative links) skips DummyUri assignment
scenarios.expectedResult: relative URLs resolved correctly against provided baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC12 clean non-empty-baseUri with preserveRelativeLinks

scenarios.description: clean(html, baseUri, safelist, with custom OutputSettings applies settings without altering cleaning
scenarios.precondition: non-empty baseUri, Safelist.simpleText(), custom OutputSettings prettyPrint=false
scenarios.expectedResult: returns cleaned fragment matching safelist rules and outputSettings applied
pseudocode: String out = Jsoup.clean(html, baseUri, list, os);
